## v0.1.4

- Reposition the extension as Local Copy Blocks with the package name `local-copy-blocks`.
- Rename user-facing Prompt Set concepts to Block Set concepts.
- Update command names, preferences, README content, specifications, local verification docs, and publish workflow paths for Local Copy Blocks.
- Regenerate demo Block Sets with reusable Markdown-backed text blocks and Dynamic Placeholders coverage.
- Replace Store screenshots and README media with captures from the renamed Local Copy Blocks user interface.
